description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and a pair of fitted trousers secured with a belt. The shirt is neatly tucked in, and the figure wears formal shoes, giving a smart-casual or business-casual appearance suitable for urban environments. The individual has a bald head and a clean-shaven face, with realistic human proportions and a neutral, upright stance. The hands are relaxed and open at the sides, and the overall build is average, neither particularly muscular nor thin. The clothing fits well, with subtle creases and folds visible, especially at the elbows and waist. The shoes are simple and formal, complementing the overall polished look.
description: An adult male in a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a clean-shaven, bald appearance. The attire is smart-casual, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-up shirt, belt, and formal shoes, with arms relaxed at the sides and a clear view of the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the rolled shirt sleeves, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, trousers, and shoes, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, shirt fit, and relaxed hand position.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and a belt
